documents.title: GRC Professional Workday Analysis — July 6 OSINT Sweep
documents.executiveSummary: Ironintel and Ironwatch live OSINT for July 6, 2026 confirms post-deadline forensic triage dominates after BOD 26-04 tier-1 windows closed on SharePoint CVE-2026-45659 (FCEB deadline July 4) and SimpleHelp CVE-2026-48558 (FCEB deadline July 2). Sysdig documents JADEPUFFER as the first agentic ransomware campaign driven end-to-end by an LLM, exploiting Langflow CVE-2025-3248 with autonomous credential harvest, Nacos takeover, and destructive database extortion. CMMC Phase 2 mandatory Level 2 C3PAO certification remains 127 days out (November 10, 2026) on NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 only. FAR Council June 23 proposed rule would standardize NIST SP 800-171 Rev 3 and 72-hour CUI incident reporting with public comments due July 23, 2026. Federal contractor 24-hour KEV triage SLA enters day twelve of enforcement (effective June 24, 2026).
keyFindings: CVE-2026-45659 (CVSS 8.8): Microsoft SharePoint Server deserialization RCE added to KEV July 1 with FCEB remediation deadline July 4, 2026 — enters day two post-deadline July 6; authenticated attacker with minimal privileges executes arbitrary code on SharePoint Server 2016, 2019, and Subscription Edition per CISA and Computer Weekly reporting.

CVE-2026-48558 (CVSS 10.0): SimpleHelp OIDC authentication bypass enters day four post-deadline after July 2 FCEB window — unauthenticated remote attacker forges JWT identity tokens to obtain privileged technician sessions and bypass MFA on OIDC-configured instances; Technology and Finance Industry Profiles must hunt rogue technician registrations in server.log.

JADEPUFFER agentic ransomware (Sysdig July 1, 2026): First documented LLM-driven end-to-end extortion chain exploits Langflow CVE-2025-3248, harvests cloud and database credentials, pivots via MinIO default credentials, forges Nacos JWT tokens, encrypts 1342 configuration items with unrecoverable AES keys — Technology sector AI development stacks are primary exposure surface.

SharePoint post-deadline triage: Restrict Site Member permissions, audit worker process child processes, and verify May 2026 security update installation (16.0.5552.1002, 16.0.10417.20128, 16.0.19725.20280) before declaring BOD 26-04 forensic evidence complete.

SimpleHelp post-deadline triage: Upgrade to 5.5.16 or 6.0 RC2 minimum; audit OIDC technician group registrations; sever internet exposure on remote support planes used by INC and Lynx ransomware initial-access chains.

CMMC Phase 2 countdown: 127 days to November 10, 2026 mandatory Level 2 C3PAO certification at award for applicable CUI solicitations; assessments remain locked to NIST SP 800-171 Revision 2 per DoD class deviation; C3PAO assessor capacity bottleneck intensifies as Phase 2 approaches.

FAR Council CUI proposed rule (June 23, 2026): Would require NIST SP 800-171 Rev 3 compliance and 72-hour CUI incident reporting across civilian contractor base; public comment period closes July 23, 2026 — Public Sector and Defense Industry Profiles must align POA&M velocity with dual Rev 2 CMMC and prospective Rev 3 FAR obligations.

Federal contractor 24-hour KEV triage SLA effective June 24, 2026 — day twelve of enforcement on July 6; Defense and Public Sector Industry Profiles must align POA&M velocity with BOD 26-04 forensic-triage-before-patch workflow.

Ironintel correlation priority: post-deadline hunts on SharePoint and SimpleHelp, JADEPUFFER Langflow and Nacos IOC sweep, CMMC C3PAO scheduling, Irongate DMZ validation before any external research enters tenant CRM.

industryProfiles.narrativeSummary: Finance GRC faces post-deadline SharePoint CVE-2026-45659 triage on collaboration stacks holding deal-room CUI while SimpleHelp OIDC bypass invalidates remote-support MFA attestations; JADEPUFFER agentic ransomware on AI workflow tooling requires board packets citing BIGINT-cent ALE without float drift and Irongate-sanitized incident ingress.

July 6, 2026 healthcare OSINT: SharePoint post-deadline triage extends HIPAA breach assessment scope when PHI repositories sit on on-premises SharePoint; SimpleHelp rogue technician sessions threaten remote clinical support planes — OCR enforcement and CIRCIA 72-hour parallel reporting readiness remain primary compliance triggers.

JADEPUFFER agentic ransomware, SharePoint deserialization RCE, and SimpleHelp MFA bypass outpace manual control mapping; Technology sector buyers demand agent-orchestrated evidence vaults with Irongate-sanitized OSINT ingress, Langflow isolation, and BOD 26-04 post-deadline orchestration at day-two velocity.

CMMC Level 2 C3PAO requirements phase into DoD contracts in 127 days while assessments remain on NIST 800-171 Rev 2; FAR Council Rev 3 proposed rule adds prospective civilian alignment pressure — Defense contractors must engage C3PAO immediately and align SSP, SPRS, and POA&M with 24-hour KEV triage SLA.

FCEB agencies operate under day-two post-deadline BOD 26-04 triage on SharePoint CVE-2026-45659 and day-four SimpleHelp CVE-2026-48558 hunt; FAR Council June 23 proposed rule would mandate NIST SP 800-171 Rev 3 and 72-hour CUI incident reporting with comments due July 23, 2026.

documents.title: SaaS Disruption Memorandum — July 6 Post-Deadline KEV Wave
documents.executiveSummary: July 6, 2026 OSINT confirms BOD 26-04 post-deadline forensic triage on SharePoint and SimpleHelp while JADEPUFFER agentic ransomware exposes structural gaps in seat-based GRC SaaS that cannot absorb LLM-autonomous attack chains or OIDC MFA bypass on remote-support planes. Sovereign control planes with Irongate ingress and integer-cent registers win procurement when collaboration, observability, and AI workflow planes converge on single-week KEV deadlines.
keyFindings: SharePoint CVE-2026-45659 post-deadline triage proves three-day remediation plus forensic evidence is operational reality for private sector as de facto standard after July 4 FCEB window.

JADEPUFFER agentic ransomware invalidates per-seat SOC monitoring SaaS when LLM agents execute 600 plus autonomous actions without human keyboard — agentic GRC with Irongate-sanitized OSINT ingress replaces blind SIEM-only stacks.

SimpleHelp OIDC MFA bypass confirms remote-support SaaS planes are initial-access vectors for ransomware operators — SaaS GRC without remote-access integrity crosswalk fails SOC 2 CC7.2 continuous monitoring attestations.

FAR Council Rev 3 proposed rule and CMMC Phase 2 dual-track compliance prove seat-based compliance SaaS cannot scale POA&M velocity for 72-hour incident reporting and C3PAO certification simultaneously.
Flat annual platform fees in whole-cent BIGINT displace per-seat models when agentic workforce scales OSINT-to-board-report pipelines at BOD 26-04 post-deadline velocity.

industryProfiles.narrativeSummary: Incumbent SaaS renewals face scrutiny when Ironframe demonstrates BOD 26-04 tier scoring, deterministic board-report ALE, and Irongate-sanitized OSINT without spreadsheet exports; SharePoint post-deadline triage and JADEPUFFER agentic campaigns are board-level when fraud monitoring depends on tamper-evident collaboration telemetry.

Fastest SaaS disruption velocity; JADEPUFFER Langflow exploitation, SharePoint deserialization, and SimpleHelp MFA bypass demand agentic GRC to replace manual Jira-to-audit bridges while patching at BOD 26-04 post-deadline orchestration speed.

ragChunks.text: Ironwatch OSINT 2026-07-06: CVE-2026-45659 (CVSS 8.8) Microsoft SharePoint Server deserialization of untrusted data added to KEV July 1 with FCEB remediation deadline July 4, 2026 — enters day two post-deadline. CISA and Computer Weekly confirm active exploitation enabling authenticated remote code execution on SharePoint Server 2016, 2019, and Subscription Edition. Finance, Technology, and Public Sector Industry Profiles must restrict Site Member permissions, audit SharePoint worker process child processes, verify May 2026 patch levels, and execute BOD 26-04 forensic triage before declaring remediation complete.

Ironintel OSINT 2026-07-06: CVE-2026-48558 (CVSS 10.0) SimpleHelp OIDC authentication bypass enters day four post-deadline after July 2 FCEB window. Unauthenticated attacker forges JWT identity tokens without cryptographic signature verification to obtain privileged technician sessions and bypass MFA on OIDC-configured instances. Technology and Finance Industry Profiles must upgrade to 5.5.16 or 6.0 RC2, audit server.log for rogue technician registrations, and sever internet exposure on remote support planes.

ragChunks.section: Active Threat Vector — JADEPUFFER Agentic Ransomware
ragChunks.text: Ironwatch OSINT 2026-07-06: Sysdig documents JADEPUFFER as first LLM-driven agentic threat actor executing end-to-end database extortion via Langflow CVE-2025-3248 initial access. Autonomous agent harvests cloud credentials, accesses MinIO with default minioadmin credentials, forges Nacos JWT tokens via CVE-2021-29441, encrypts 1342 Nacos configuration items with unrecoverable AES keys, and establishes cron persistence every 30 minutes. Technology Industry Profile must isolate internet-facing Langflow and AI workflow orchestration backends and treat self-narrating adaptive payloads as pre-ransomware indicator requiring Irongate-sanitized incident ingress.

Ironintel policy monitor 2026-07-06: CMMC Phase 2 begins November 10, 2026 — 127 days remaining for mandatory Level 2 C3PAO certification at award for applicable CUI solicitations. Assessments remain on NIST SP 800-171 Revision 2 per DoD class deviation. C3PAO assessor capacity bottleneck intensifies; organizations beginning preparation in Q3 2026 miss November Phase 2 eligibility. Defense Industry Profile must engage C3PAO immediately and align SSP, SPRS, and POA&M with 24-hour KEV triage SLA effective June 24, 2026.

ragChunks.section: NIST / FAR Regulatory Update — CUI Proposed Rule
ragChunks.text: Ironintel policy monitor 2026-07-06: FAR Council proposed rule June 23, 2026 would standardize contractor CUI safeguarding under NIST SP 800-171 Revision 3 and mandate 72-hour CUI incident reporting via new clause 52.240-7. Public comment period closes July 23, 2026 — 17 days remaining. Public Sector and Defense Industry Profiles must track dual Rev 2 CMMC certification path and prospective Rev 3 FAR alignment without conflating assessment baselines.

ragChunks.section: Active Threat Vector — SharePoint Perimeter Exposure
ragChunks.text: Ironintel OSINT 2026-07-06: SharePoint on-premises servers holding sensitive corporate and CUI-adjacent data remain high-value nation-state and ransomware entry points. CVE-2026-45659 exploitation requires authenticated access with minimal privileges making Site Member permission audits and internet exposure reduction critical compensating controls until patch verification completes. Healthcare and Finance Industry Profiles with on-premises SharePoint must extend breach assessment scope beyond cloud-only M365 assumptions.

Ironwatch OSINT 2026-07-06: Federal contractor 24-hour KEV triage SLA under BOD 26-04 enters day twelve of enforcement effective June 24, 2026. Post-deadline SharePoint and SimpleHelp entries require forensic triage evidence before patch declaration. Defense and Public Sector Industry Profiles must align POA&M velocity with same-week KEV orchestration and Irongate-sanitized deficiency reporting in simulation plane only.

All July 6 live OSINT bytes passed Agent 14 Irongate DMZ sanitization (script-strip, BIGINT-cent validation) before CRM persistence. Strategic Intel dashboard refresh binds to manifest ironintel-osint-2026-07-06-live.
